name: Shenghua Lande Scitech Limited
summary: Shenghua Lande Scitech Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the trading of hardware and computer software in the People's Republic of China. It also provides telecommunication solutions; smart city solutions; and e-commerce supply chain services. The company was formerly known as Zheda Lande Scitech Limited and changed its name to Shenghua Lande Scitech Limited in June 2017. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Huzhou, the People's Republic of China. Shenghua Lande Scitech Limited is a subsidiary of Zhejiang Shenghua Holdings Group Company Limited.
